name: Jupyter and ML Development Tools
description: Installs Jupyter Lab, core Python data science libraries, and machine learning tools for interactive development in devcontainers

installJupyterLab.description: Install JupyterLab (true) or Jupyter Notebook only (false)

packages.description: Package set: minimal (jupyter only), core (+ numpy, pandas, matplotlib), full (+ scikit-learn, scipy, seaborn)

installUv.description: Install uv for faster Python package management
